pytest assertion verifying parsed canonical NTP-server list membership; not a URL trust check. The `in` operator is list-membership semantics, not URL substring sanitisation.

Every interpolation in renderBucket() goes through local escapeHtml() helper (lines 843-848). Data source is server-side compiled CapabilityMatrix, not operator input. See docs/security-triage/2026-05-21/01-investigation-A.md alert #4.

Codec grammar regex; polynomial pattern shape, per-line splitlines() bound, 50MB file-upload cap (MAX_CONFIG_SIZE). Backtracking risk theoretical not exploitable. Triage: docs/security-triage/2026-05-21/01-investigation-B.md.

Operator-initiated SSH to ad-hoc device IPs from DeviceTarget.host. AutoAddPolicy matches threat model where operator (not netcanon) is trust anchor. See docs/security-triage/2026-05-21/01-investigation-B.md.

Accepted-risk per netcanon hybrid action-pinning policy (2026-05-21): tag-pin allowed for actions/* + github/* (GitHub-controlled, force-push protected); SHA-pin required for third-parties only. Suppression in .github/zizmor.yml.

softprops/action-gh-release@v3 provides auto-create-if-missing, generate_release_notes, structured prerelease detection, fail_on_unmatched_files. Swap cost > security gain. See docs/security-triage/2026-05-21/99-synthesis.md class 7.
